name: @oaslananka/kicad-test-harness
description: Shared KiCad Studio Kit test utilities for fixtures, golden files, MCP mocks, webview mocks, CLI calls, and temporary workspaces.

scripts.format: prettier --ignore-unknown --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern --write package.json README.md tsconfig*.json scripts/*.cjs src/**/*.ts test/**/*.ts
scripts.format:check: prettier --ignore-unknown --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern --check package.json README.md tsconfig*.json scripts/*.cjs src/**/*.ts test/**/*.ts
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
